query:
SELECT rating, indexador, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(isOutlier) as outliers
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = (SELECT MAX(dataReferencia) FROM spread_analysis)
GROUP BY rating, indexador
ORDER BY indexador, rating;
